sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: NOC, Q4 매출 10% 성장에 수주잔고 957억 달러 사상 최고치 경신 — 2026년 중간 한 자릿수 성장 전망

keyPoints.text: 2025년 수주잔고가 957억 달러로 회사 사상 최고치를 기록했으며, 연간 수주배율(book-to-bill) 1.10을 달성해 수요 모멘텀이 견고함을 확인했다.
Q4 매출이 전년 동기 대비 10% 증가한 117억 달러를 기록했고, 2025년 연간 매출은 420억 달러로 2% 성장했다.
2025년 영업 현금흐름은 48억 달러, 잉여 현금흐름은 33억 달러로, 현금 창출력이 견조했다.

businessChanges.text: 연간 유기적 매출이 전년 대비 3% 증가한 418억 달러로, 포트폴리오 전반에서 실질 수요 확대가 이루어지고 있음을 시사한다.
경영진은 기록적 수주잔고를 토대로 2026년 중간 한 자릿수 매출 성장을 전망하며, 고객 요구 대응 역량과 기술 납품 능력에 자신감을 표명했다.

financialHighlights.text: Q4 영업이익이 전년 동기 대비 17% 증가한 13억 달러를 기록했으며, 영업이익률(OM rate)은 10.9%였다.
Q4 순이익은 14억 달러, 연간 순이익은 42억 달러로 전년(41억 7,400만 달러) 대비 소폭 증가했다.
연금·퇴직급여(MTM) 세후 수혜 3억 9,400만 달러가 Q4 및 연간 순이익에 반영됐으며, 이를 제외한 MTM 조정 연간 순이익은 37억 8,800만 달러였다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 가이던스가 중간 한 자릿수 성장을 제시하고 있어, 다음 실적 발표에서 세그먼트별 성장률 배분과 수주잔고 소화 속도를 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: ngc.com Northrop Grumman Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results • Backlog grows to new company record of $95.7 billion driven by full year book to bill of 1.10 • Q4 sales increase 10 percent to $11.7 billion; 2025 sales of $42.0 billion • Q4 operating income increases 17 percent to $1.3 billion; OM rate of 10.9 percent • Q4 segment operating income 1 increases 10 percent; segment OM rate 1 of 11.2 percent • 2025 diluted earnings per share (EPS) of $29.08; MTM-adjusted EPS 1 of $26.34 • 2025 operating cash flow of $4.8 billion; free cash flow 1 of $3.3 billion • 2026 financial guidance projects mid-single digit sales growth and continued strong  Normalized numeric aliases: $95.7 billion = 957억 달러; $11.7 billion = 117억 달러; $42.0 billion = 420억 달러; $1.3 billion = 13억 달러; $4.8 billion = 48억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $95.7 = 95.7달러; $11.7 = 11.7달러; $1.3 = 1.3달러; 10 percent = 10%; $4.8 = 4.8달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; 17 percent = 17%; 10.9 percent = 10.9%; 11.2 percent = 11.2%.

as compared with $10.7 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024. Sales increased 2 percent to $42.0 billion in 2025, as compared with $41.0 billion in 2024. Organic sales 1 increased 3 percent to $41.8 billion in 2025, as compared with $40.7 billion in 2024. Fourth quarter 2025 net earnings totaled $1.4 billion, or $9.99 per diluted share, and 2025 net earnings were $4.2 billion, or $29.08 per diluted share. Excluding the after-tax mark-to-market (MTM) benefit of $394 million, fourth quarter 2025 MTM-adjusted net earnings 1 totaled $1.0 billion, or $7.23 per diluted share, and 2025 MTM-adjusted net earnings 1 totaled  Normalized numeric aliases: $10.7 billion = 107억 달러; $42.0 billion = 420억 달러; $41.0 billion = 410억 달러; $41.8 billion = 418억 달러; $40.7 billion = 407억 달러; $1.4 billion = 14억 달러; $4.2 billion = 42억 달러; $394 million = 3억 9,400만 달러; $3.8 billion = 38억 달러; $40.7 = 40.7달러; $394 = 394달러; 2 percent = 2%; $1.0 = 1.0달러; $7.23 = 7.23달러; $3.8 = 3.8달러; $26.34 = 26.34달러; 3 percent = 3%.

of our customers’ requirements and ability to deliver differentiating technology at speed and scale position us well to continue to meet the moment for our nation and our partners around the globe. Our record backlog supports our 2026 outlook of mid-single digit sales growth and we are confident in our ability to deliver continued strong performance. ” 1 Non-GAAP measure - see definitions at the end of this earnings release. Northrop Grumman Corporation 2980 Fairview Park Drive • Falls Church, VA 22042-4511 news.northropgrumman.com Northrop Grumman Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Financial Results 2 MTM-adjusted Net Earnings and EPS 1 Net earnings for the fourth quarter and full year 2025 were increased by a $394 million after-tax MTM benefit. The MTM benefit relates to pension and other post-retirement benefits (OPB) actuarial gains and losses, which the company  Normalized numeric aliases: $394 million = 3억 9,400만 달러; $394 = 394달러.

immediately through earnings upon annual remeasurement of the assets and projected benefit obligations of our pension and OPB plans. MTM-adjusted earnings 1 and EPS 1 are the measures the company uses to compare performance to prior periods and for EPS guidance. The table below reconciles net earnings and diluted EPS to MTM-adjusted net earnings 1 and MTM-adjusted diluted EPS 1 : Three Months Ended December 31 Year Ended December 31 $ in millions, except per share amounts 2025 2024 2025 2024 MTM-adjusted net earnings Net earnings $ 1,427 $ 1,264 $ 4,182 $ 4,174 MTM benefit (527) (443) (527) (443) MTM-related deferred  Normalized numeric aliases: $1,427 = 1,427달러; $1,264 = 1,264달러; $4,182 = 4,182달러; $4,174 = 4,174달러; $1,033 = 1,033달러; $932 = 932달러; $3,788 = 3,788달러; $3,842 = 3,842달러; $8.66 = 8.66달러; 4,182 million = 41억 8,200만 달러; 1,264 million = 12억 6,400만 달러; 4,174 million = 41억 7,400만 달러; 1,033 million = 10억 3,300만 달러; 3,788 million = 37억 8,800만 달러; 3,842 million = 38억 4,200만 달러.
